name: strategic-alignment
description: > Cascades strategy from boardroom to individual contributor and detects misalignment. Covers strategy articulation testing, cascade mapping, orphan goal detection, conflicting goal identification, silo diagnosis, communication gap analysis, and realignment protocols. Use when teams are pulling in different directions, OKRs don't connect, departments optimize locally at company expense, strategy doesn't translate to execution, or when user mentions alignment, strategy cascade, silo, conflicting
author: borghei
